description: Square provides payment, point-of-sale, commerce, and related business software and financial services. The squarecdn.com domain is used here as a CDN host for Square’s web payments JavaScript asset.
summary: squarecdn.com exposes a public HTTP surface for loading the Square Web Payments SDK browser script from its CDN; no API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces on squarecdn.com were found.

surfaces.name: Square Web Payments SDK CDN script
